title: Jamaican Jerk Potato Skewers
description: Grilled potato skewers with a Jamaican jerk seasoning and a squeeze of citrus.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the potato cubes, cornstarch, lime juice, and jamaican jerk seasoning. Toss to coat.
2. Thread the potato mixture onto the bamboo skewers.
3. Heat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
4. Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the potatoes are tender and slightly charred.
5. Serve hot, garnished with additional lime wedges if desired.
